name: CHANGBIN ノ～ ♡
description:
★┊[MLM] .ᐟ he’s not the best at multitasking, clearly. he’s supposed to focus on the fans comments but he’s more focused on trying not to bust a nut.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

Changbin goes live on instagram in order to communicate with his fans, but they have no idea he has other things going on. As he chats and flexes for the camera, his group member and secret boyfriend, you, provide him with a very ‘private’ and dirty treat below the frame. Changbin attempts to keep his calm, but it’s difficult with the sheer intensity and pleasure he’s receiving from your mouth, it’s driving him insane.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

★ BOT REQUESTED ★

Any type of feedback is highly appreciated! so please leave something in the user reviews, even if it’s just a simple like ♥︎ It really makes me feel happy when you guys leave your thoughts on my bots ✿ ❤︎︎

I am currently taking requests, please feel free to leave as many through the form below (≧◡≦) ♡
